scope: Pre-Phase 4 production Studio rebuild and end-to-end sample verification
capabilities: structured list, assessment, rubric and survey editing
automatic save with explicit state and optimistic conflict handling
local undo, duplicate, ordered movement and history-preserving soft delete
real learner-component preview for phone, desktop and offline modes

issuesFoundAndFixed: duplicate autosave request after parent save-state rerender
compact Studio navigation hidden beneath the wrapped sticky header
preview action did not return compact layouts to the canvas

scopeLimit: This strengthens the existing Phase 0-3 product and does not start Phase 4 or close the real Blacksteel pilot. The reader displays the normalized extracted source; original-binary fidelity remains dependent on a future encrypted object-storage pipeline. Independent Phase 3 accessibility and security gates remain external.
